theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: Micron: 정량 종합 68점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 57 / 중기 68 / 장기 76. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 약과열
overheat.guidance: 분할매수만. 한 번에 들어가지 말고 1/3~1/2씩 나눠서.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 9.5% → 2-ATR 손절폭 18.9%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 50MA, 라운드 $800. 현재가 대비 +29.3% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $801.1 아래 손절가 $639.2 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Biolife Is Said to Have Drawn Takeover Interest From Repligen
top_news.summary: Biolife Solutions Inc. has attracted takeover interest from parties including diagnostics company Repligen Corp., according to people with knowledge of the matter.

top_news.title: Markets, Economy Ignoring Policy Shocks: Skelly
top_news.summary: Dan Skelly, managing director and head of the equity model portfolio team at Morgan Stanley Wealth Management, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Magnolia Oil & Gas Is in Lead to Acquire WildFire for Over $4 Billion
top_news.summary: Magnolia Oil & Gas Corp. has emerged as the front-runner to acquire closely held WildFire Energy for more than $4 billion in what would rank as its largest-ever acquisition, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Dow Jones Finishes Day Down; Week Up | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Coffee Company Kahawa 1893 Works to Empower Women Farmers
top_news.summary: Margaret Nyambumo, founder of coffee company Kahawa 1893 and third-generation coffee farmer, said that she created the option to directly tip the female farmers who grow her coffee beans because she wanted to find a way to consistently and fairly compensate them regardless of fluctuation in coffee prices. Nyambumo said that the tips from customers — which are matched by the company — have been used by one of the farming collectives to start a scholarship for young girls to stay in sc

top_news.title: Education 'Getting Act Together' on Personal Finance: Cohen
top_news.summary: Abby Joseph Cohen, professor at Columbia Business School, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." They discuss personal finance and the US education system's effort to educate students on financial literacy. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Alternative Soda Brands Taking Over Beverage Markets
top_news.summary: Poppi Co-Founder Allison Ellsworth describes struggles of breaking into beverage industry, warns getting product on shelves is "capital intensive." Ellsworth says movement within "MAHA" is changing industry standards, including for beverage giants like Pepsi which purchased Poppi in 2025 for nearly $2 Billion. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Abby Joseph Cohen Talks Greenspan's Legacy
top_news.summary: Abby Joseph Cohen, professor at Columbia Business School, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." They discuss the legacy of former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan who died this week at the age of 100. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Carl Richards on the Power of Compounding
top_news.summary: Barry sits down with Carl Richards author of "Your Money: Reimagining Wealth in Simple Sketches ." They discuss Carl's unlikely start in finance and building his own firm. Carl also breaks down how one sketch helped him translate wealth management and become a New York Times columnist.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Sketching Wealth Strategy: Masters in Business with Carl Richards
top_news.summary: Barry sits down with Carl Richards author of "Your Money: Reimagining Wealth in Simple Sketches ". They discuss Carl's unlikely start in finance and building his own firm. Carl also breaks down how one sketch helped him translate wealth management and become a New York Times columnist.  (Source: Bloomberg)
